final_response: Identified recurring contractor onboarding friction: 4-day credential provisioning delay in Feb, March, and current (May). Pattern suggests systematic issue in IT access workflow. This warrants escalation to IT leadership and process review—recommend filing a formal ticket with historical data to drive remediation.
actions: Recognized pattern: three instances of 4-day provisioning delays (Feb, March, May)
Classified as systemic onboarding bottleneck, not isolated incident
Inferred root cause: IT provisioning workflow lacks external contractor fast-track
Recommended routing: IT process improvement + executive notification
notes: User explicitly flagged recurrence to prevent loss of tracking
All three instances occurred during contractor/external hiring events
First-week productivity loss is quantifiable cost—worth systematic fix
Control condition: blank agent; no system prompts or special routing logic applied
